changelog.notes: Initial catalogue with baseline decision questions and condition lists.

principles.question_text: Is any portfolio action permitted under current authority?
principles.rationale: Authority context governs whether an action is permitted.

inaction_conditions.description: Actor role is not authorized for any action.
Decision intent is ADVISE only and action requires APPROVE or EXECUTE.

mandatory_action_conditions.description: None (no action required purely by authority context).

principles.question_text: Is the portfolio drift out of allowed bands?
principles.rationale: Drift relative to policy bands determines whether rebalancing is required.

inaction_conditions.description: All asset-class drift values are within bands.
Portfolio state is missing or incomplete.

mandatory_action_conditions.description: Any asset-class drift breaches its allowed band and a rebalance is permitted.

principles.question_text: Are there pending cash flows that require contribution-based rebalancing?
principles.rationale: Pending contributions can be used to restore target weights without selling.

inaction_conditions.description: Portfolio state is missing or incomplete.

mandatory_action_conditions.description: Pending contributions exist and drift is out of band; use contribution-based rebalance.

principles.rationale: Risk limits and drawdown thresholds can force deferral or review.
